text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>7. Denen Herren Negotianten, welche das bekannte Wechsel-Buch: <BIBL><TITLE>La Banque vendie facile anae principales Nation de lEurope</TITLE></BIBL> haben, zu wissen gethan, daß der Anthor desselben, <BIBL><AUTHOR>247. Gixauidenae</AUTHOR></BIBL>, solches mit einem dridten Supplement vermehren, auch das gantze Werck, durch Subscriptionen zum zweyten mahl drucken lassen wird, wovon das Project bey Herrn Samuel Haag dem Buchbinder zu gelben Horn am Spahlenberg zu haben, auch bey ihme zu subscribiren ist.</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":2,"explanation":"1. The AUTHOR element was wrapped in a BIBL tag but the closing </BIBL> tag was missing; it was added after the </AUTHOR> tag to properly close the bibliographic reference. 2. The corrupted character sequence \"da\\u221a\\u00fc\" (a mis-encoded representation) was corrected to the intended German word \"daß\". The other escaped sequences were valid Unicode escapes already rendered correctly in the source. No other structural or tagging changes were necessary, as the ITEM, BIBL, TITLE, and AUTHOR tags were otherwise correctly placed."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>7. Denen Herren Negotianten, welche das bekannte Wechsel-Buch: <BIBL><TITLE>La Banque vendie facile anae principales Nation de lEurope</TITLE></BIBL> haben, zu wissen gethan, daß der Anthor desselben, <BIBL><AUTHOR>247. Gixauidenae</AUTHOR></BIBL>, solches mit einem dridten Supplement vermehren, auch das gantze Werck, durch Subscriptionen zum zweyten mahl drucken lassen wird, wovon das Project bey Herrn Samuel Haag dem Buchbinder zu gelben Horn am Spahlenberg zu haben, auch bey ihme zu subscribiren ist.</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1. The AUTHOR element was wrapped in a BIBL tag but the closing </BIBL> tag was missing; it was added after the </AUTHOR> tag to properly close the bibliographic reference. 2. The corrupted character sequence "da\u221a\u00fc" (a mis-encoded representation) was corrected to the intended German word "daß". The other escaped sequences were valid Unicode escapes already rendered correctly in the source. No other structural or tagging changes were necessary, as the ITEM, BIBL, TITLE, and AUTHOR tags were otherwise correctly placed.
